description: Perform a 'Whale Analysis' (80/20 rule) on the Sakila database to identify VIP customers generating the top 80% of revenue. Using the local server (host: localhost, user: ga, password: password123), create a view named 'v_customer_ltv' in the sakila database aggregating total revenue per customer (customer_id, first_name, last_name, total_revenue) ordered by revenue descending. Create a second analytical view named 'v_pareto_revenue' that uses window functions to calculate a running total of revenue and a cumulative percentage (cumulative_pct = running_total / global_total * 100). This view must include: customer_id, first_name, last_name, total_revenue, running_total, and cumulative_pct. Export the customers where cumulative_pct is 80.00 or less to /home/ga/Documents/exports/vip_whales.csv, including headers and sorted by total_revenue descending.
